query:
SELECT t.id, t.station_id, t.status, t.total_cost, t.investor_share, s.owner_id
FROM transactions t
JOIN charging_stations s ON t.station_id = s.id
WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
